title: How one faithful morning builds a man the rest of the day can't break
caption:
The morning is the only hour that belongs entirely to you. Most men give it to the phone.

Four things that change the rest of the day:

Open the Word before you open the feed. Whoever you feed first wins.

Move before you have motivation to. The rep teaches the body who's in charge.

Name one thing you're grateful for and one thing you'll do today. Gratitude checks pride. The one thing checks drift.

Start the hardest thing before the noise begins. After the noise starts, the hard thing won't happen. Before it, anything is possible.

The morning isn't a ritual. It's a decision about who runs your life.

Save this and run it tomorrow morning.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #morningroutine #christianity #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
